revision.comment: Bot: create Islamic-calendar day stub
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: overwrite Islamic-day stub
revision.text:
{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 21''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:21 صفر]] [[ckb:٢١ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۱ صفر]] [[pnb:21 صفر]] [[sd:21 صفر]] [[ur:21 صفر]]

{{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 21''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:21 صفر]] [[ckb:٢١ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۱ صفر]] [[pnb:21 صفر]] [[sd:21 صفر]] [[ur:21 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

{{Islamic Safar}} {{Expand Arabic}} {{Expand Bengali}} {{Expand Persian}} '''Safar 21''' is a day of the [[Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:21 صفر]] [[ckb:٢١ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۱ صفر]] [[pnb:21 صفر]] [[sd:21 صفر]] [[ur:21 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.text:

==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Safar]] [[ar:21 صفر]] [[ckb:٢١ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۱ صفر]] [[pnb:21 صفر]] [[sd:21 صفر]] [[ur:21 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Expand Arabic}}↵{{Expand Bengali}}↵{{Expand Persian}}" to ""
adding the templates to the front above the calendar template
bumping these so I can see the more important ones that have not been recently edited
Bot: add wikidata link from Arabic interwiki (Q4121467)
working on the date checking
Adding [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 8]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] to [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Unchecked Islamic Dates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq 4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add interwikis from Wikidata
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ar:21 صفر]][[ckb:٢١ی سەفەر]][[fa:۲۱ صفر]][[ms:21 Safar]][[pnb:21 صفر]][[sd:21 صفر]][[ur:21 صفر]]
{{Expand Arabic}}
{{Expand Bengali}}
{{Expand Persian}}
{{Islamic Safar}}

'''Safar 21''' is a day of the [[:en:Islamic calendar|Islamic calendar]]. It is the 21st day of the month [[Safar]].

==See also==
* [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]]

[[Category:Safar]]

'''Safar 21''' is a day of the {{ill|Islamic calendar|en|Islamic calendar|WD=Q28892|lt=Islamic calendar}}. It is the 21st day of the month [[Safar]].
==See also== * [[List of days of the Islamic Calendar]] [[ar:21 صفر]] [[ckb:٢١ی سەفەر]] [[fa:۲۱ صفر]] [[pnb:21 صفر]] [[sd:21 صفر]] [[ur:21 صفر]] {{Islamic Calendar}}
{{wikidata link|Q4121467}} [[Category:Days 21 of the Islamic Calendar]] [[Category:Islamic Calendar Days]] [[Category:Safar]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
